title: Harmsiella
taxonomy: Harmsiella is a genus of fungi in the family Phyllachoraceae, which belongs to the class Sordariomycetes. This classification places it within the larger phylum Ascomycota. The genus Harmsiella is further categorized under the order Phyllachorales. At the kingdom level, Harmsiella is classified as Fungi.
